title: Lesson 504: 対する, 大戦, 態度...

items.gloss: to face (each other); to be facing; to be directed toward (the future, etc.); to be in response to; to be related to; to receive (a client, etc.); to compare with; to contrast with; to be in opposition with; to be opposed to; to confront; to oppose; to compete with
great war; great battle; world war
attitude; manner; behaviour; demeanour; bearing; attitude (towards an issue, etc.); position; stance; stand
president (of a nation); big man; boss; buddy; mate
majority; more than half; most (of); mostly; largely; mainly; predominately; nearly
representative; representation; delegation; type; example; model; switchboard number; main number
